title: Drag & Steam
description: This is a fabric modpack based on Create mod, Valkyrien skies, Clockwork and other QOL mods that you will like.
body:
# Drag & Steam: The Ultimate Tech-Industrial Modpack

**Overview**

Drag & Steam is a tech-industrial modpack built for players who crave automation, machinery, and intricate factory setups. Whether you’re a redstone genius, a tech-savvy tinkerer, or an industrial enthusiast, Drag & Steam gives you the tools to transform raw resources into advanced systems with maximum efficiency and creativity.

### Key Features
### 
**🔧 Tech & Automation:**

- Dive into powerful mods like Create, Valkyrien skies, and other Create addons, each offering unique approaches to automation, energy production, and resource processing.

- Combine conveyor belts, gears, steam engines, and high-tech machinery for endlessly creative contraptions.

**⚙️ Enhanced Progression & Logistics:**


- Use mods like Extended drawers or CC: tweaked for networked item management and automation pipelines.

- Custom recipes and balanced progression to keep the tech journey challenging and rewarding.

**🎮 Performance:**

- Comes with performance-enhancing mods like Sodium, Lithium, and FerriteCore to ensure smooth gameplay even in machinery-heavy worlds.

**🛠️ Modded Redstone Playground:**

- Drag & Steam embraces redstone-focused mods like Wired redstone, expanding the logic and control possibilities for automated systems.

> **Why Choose Drag & Steam?**
> 
> If you're looking for a tech-focused, automation-driven experience without overwhelming bloat, Drag & Steam strikes the perfect balance between depth and playability. Ideal for solo engineers or multiplayer factory-building crews.

**Perfect For:**

- Players who love Create-style automation
- Fans of industrial factory management
- Builders who enjoy functional design
- Server play with a technical twist

<details>
<summary>Important notes</summary>
  
- **_CREATE 6_** is now also for **_FABRIC_**, but i will add it when other Create addons will be _compatible_ with it.

</details>
